details: Elected representatives of the people in the Lok Sabha. Currently includes 543 elected members from various constituencies across India.
importance: MPs are the primary link between the central government and the local constituency. They participate in national policy making and oversight.

details: Elected representatives to the State Legislative Assembly (Vidhan Sabha) of various states and union territories in India.
importance: MLAs focus on state-level legislation and local development within their state constituencies.
